name: HMS Alaunia (F 17)
events: This page, displaying the wartime history of HMS Alaunia [as repair ship] was created in December 2024.
21 Aug 1945 At 1200 A/21, HMS Alaunia (Capt. H.J. Anchor, OBE, RNR) is recommissioned as repair ship at the Devonport Dockyard. (2)
17 Sep 1945 HMS Alaunia (Capt. H.J. Anchor, OBE, RNR) conducted D/G trials off Plymouth. (3)
19 Sep 1945 HMS Alaunia (Capt. H.J. Anchor, OBE, RNR) conducted speed trials on the measured mile off Plymouth. (3)
28 Sep 1945 HMS Alaunia (Capt. H.J. Anchor, OBE, RNR) conducted D/G trials off Plymouth.
She remained at Plymouth until 8 October when she left for the Far East. (3)
ADM numbers indicate documents at the British National Archives at Kew, London.
